what: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: goal analysiskmeans perform K Means Clustering Single Cell Experiment data object!

title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: can install development version analysiskmeans GitHub : can also …

title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: basic example use data_config function set SingleCellExperiment data usable functionality package!
code: library(analysiskmeans)   utils::data(example_sce, package="analysiskmeans")   sce <- example_sce   results <- data_config(sce)   sce <- results$sce

title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: Next, can take look creating subset data including particular number top selected genes! Keep mind fill parameter value n_top, 50 default value. small portion subset shown .

title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: can now compute PCA analysis part Kmeans. Within , need pass mat_norm object just created computepca() function. outputs pca function shown .
code: utils::data(example_sce, package="analysiskmeans")   sce1 <- example_sce   results1 <- data_config(sce1)   sce1 <- results1$sce   mat_norm1 <- top_x_genes(sce1, n_top = 50)   pca1 <- computepca(mat_norm1)   pca1$sdev[1:5] ## [1] 2.517584 2.402654 2.197769 2.060160 1.984220

title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: kmeans function conducts clustering iterative fashion, going inputted parameters minimum k values maximum k values. km_list object contains large amount information clustering. metrics object contains wss average silhouette scores corresponding k value range. example metrics looks like shown .
code: utils::data(example_sce, package="analysiskmeans")   sce <- example_sce   results <- data_config(sce)   sce <- results$sce   mat_norm <- top_x_genes(sce, n_top = 50)   pca <- computepca(mat_norm)   max_k <- 10   min_k <-5   outputs <- k_means(min_k = min_k, max_k=max_k, pca = pca)   metrics<-outputs$metrics   km_list <- outputs$km_list   metrics ##    k      wss avg_silhouette ## 1  5 625.5026     0.06131297 ## 2  6 565.5828     0.06596026 ## 3  7 512.3719     0.06487671 ## 4  8 459.8210     0.06096352 ## 5  9 408.9954     0.06596343 ## 6 10 360.5383     0.06911235

title: This Package provides metrics and plots for a K Means Model
text: cluster_plot() function takes outputs kmeans function plots data based principal components. example plot shown , cluster differentiated color. plot following based example selected k value. case chosen value 8 example.
